name: Globe Exploration (Y.C.D.) Limited Partnership
summary: Globe Exploration (Y.C.D.) Limited Partnership engages in the oil and gas exploration, development, and production activities in Israel and the United States. It holds participation interest in the New Ofek and New Yahel licenses in Israel; and 90% working interest in an oil lease in Santa Barbara, California. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Rishon LeZion, Israel.
